# GATE LEDGER — every named check, generated from the suite
*Generated by scripts/gen_gate_ledger.py — regenerate after adding gates; never hand-edit.*

**Naming rule (adopted 2026-07-16):** `Stage T-n` (hyphenated) = Mode T build stages
(TRANSLATION_PIPELINE.md). `Gate Tnn` (no hyphen) = named checks below. Different families.

## T2 golden-run regression
- **T2** — Solstice canonical hash reproduces golden v5
- **T2** — Blackland canonical hash reproduces golden v2

## T3 metamorphic suite (direct-mechanics layer; balances/behavior fixed)

## T4 challenge engine vs labeled broken applicant (Icarus)
- **T4** — clean case (Solstice) raises no constraint breaches

## T14 fail-closed validation
- **T14** — missing required assumption fails closed
- **T14** — missing required assumption fails closed
- **T14** — nonsense input (negative attrition) rejected
- **T14** — nonsense input (negative attrition) rejected
- **T1** — supported-mechanics client (Prairie, JSON-only) runs clean, zero code

## T6 strong form: unused modules must not move existing clients
- **T6** — Solstice unchanged with commercial_lending/relationship modules registered

## T15 output-contract parity: Excel round-trip must reproduce the JSON run
- **T15** — scenarios identical across formats
- **T15** — monthly financials identical across formats
- **T15** — cohort, priors, flags identical across formats

## T16 validate/run seam: anything validate_config passes, run() must complete
- **T16** — validated config runs end-to-end
- **T16** — validated config runs end-to-end
- **T16** — config missing run()-consumed key fails closed
- **T16** — config missing run()-consumed key fails closed

## T17 provenance gate: source names never appear in the product surface
- **T17** — web/ carries no source attribution

## T18 engagement store: schema-pinned save/load reproduces the golden hash
- **T18a** — stored-then-loaded Solstice reproduces golden hash
- **T18b** — unsupported schema version fails closed
- **T18b** — unsupported schema version fails closed
- **T18c** — missing schema version fails closed
- **T18c** — missing schema version fails closed

## T19 field library: concordance closure + progressive disclosure + budget
- **T19a** — every golden-consumed assumption key has a library disposition
- **T19b** — library names no field the chassis does not consume
- **T19c** — deposits-only surface carries no lending fields
- **T19d** — adding an archetype strictly adds typed fields
- **T19e** — typed budget: 2-product <=40, 4-product <=70

## T20 dialect bridge: chassis drivers -> workspace config, paths pinned
- **T20a** — bridged deposit path within $1k/qtr of chassis
- **T20b** — bridged card path within $1k/qtr of chassis

## T21 v3.1 empty-start + taxonomy templates carry the source values
- **T21a** — default starts empty (products and modules)
- **T21b** — fail-closed preserved: empty start cannot run (UI gates the engine)
- **T21c** — template constants match the source workbook
- **T21d** — fitted template: Q1 exact and Q12 within house tol (editable scalars, no pins)

## T22 FIW: per-engagement workbook, progressive sheets, values, hash
- **T22a** — deposits-only FIW: no loan sheet (disclosure extends to paper)
- **T22b** — generation hash on README matches the canonical hash
- **T22c** — values transcribed (rate 0.5%, opening $8.93M) and line rendered as label
- **T22d** — adding a loan adds ASSM_LOANS; no mb_ rows without originate-to-sell

## T23 FIW diff-import: only human edits apply; facts ignored; fail-closed
- **T23a** — the one human edit applied
- **T23b** — untouched workbook cells do not clobber in-app edits since generation
- **T23c** — fact rows are ignored even when vandalized
- **T23d** — edit report names exactly the human change
- **T23e** — unknown generation state fails closed

## T24 Mode T stage T-1: ingest+recon on the two real shapes
- **T24a** — hidden sheets surfaced (the PEER lesson)
- **T24b** — lexicon finds the expected themes across the workbook
- **T24c** — a long time axis detected (labeled monthly, or periodic span>=18)
- **T24d** — no unit is ever asserted
- **T24e** — recon is deterministic
- **T24f** — CSV shape (S4): periodic axis (span 12, cadence NOT guessed) + volume/fee candidates

## T25 Mode T stage T-2: mapping session — declarations, exact series, gaps
- **T25a** — series assignment without declared cadence/units is refused
- **T25b** — mapped series reproduces the client's path exactly (house tol $1k)
- **T25c** — scalar conversion applied with provenance user
- **T25d** — translation log names source, slot, and conversion for every assignment
- **T25e** — unfilled required slots surface as gap questions

## T26 converter library: arithmetic, conventions, registry integrity
- **T26a** — scalar converters: x3, /4, pct, bp, $000s
- **T26b** — annual steps -> 12 quarterly points, held flat per year (no interpolation)
- **T26c** — dollar-adds path matches the source-workbook recursion (targets sidecar)
- **T26d** — mapping session consumes the library registry (no duplicate arithmetic)

## T27 inverter metamorphic gate: golden statements -> invert -> re-run -> same statements
- **T27a** — deposit balance path reproduced ($000s, house tol 1.0)
- **T27b** — loan balance path reproduced
- **T27c** — interest expense reproduced (pinned deposit rates)
- **T27d** — interest income reproduced (pinned yields)
- **T27e** — charge-offs reproduced (pinned CO rates, compensated originations)
- **T27f** — statement-series hash equality (the doc's metamorphic test, made precise)

## T28 stage T-5: translation log first-class; gaps become questions
- **T28a** — log carries the source recon hash and one row per assignment
- **T28b** — unmapped required slot (deposit rate) becomes a phrased question
- **T28c** — the log is deterministic (stable hash)
- **T28d** — doctrine rides in the artifact itself

## T29 Icarus at entry: blockers stop nonsense; optimism enters WITH warnings
- **T29a** — Icarus's mispriced savings (1.25% vs baseline 2.5%) enters WITH a warning
- **T29b** — Icarus's optimistic card losses (1.9% vs baseline 4%) warned by name
- **T29c** — arithmetic self-destruction and negative runoff are BLOCKERS
- **T29d** — the clean golden passes the screen silently
